Name: 552_met_nastia_poland_ukrainian
Representative_Docs: ['I met dozens of refugees during that time and many of their stories have stayed with me ever since. But none more so than that of the then 15 year old Ukrainian refugee Anastasia Spock or Nastia as we know her, whom I met during my time in Poland. Nastia had been forced to flee her eastern Ukrainian hometown of Peshotravensk, which is about halfway between Dnieper and Donetsk.', 'During my first trip in the spring of 2022 on my way to Ukraine, I made stops in Hungary and Poland. I met dozens of refugees during that time and many of their stories have stayed with me ever since. But none more so than that of the then 15 year old Ukrainian refugee Anastasia Spock or Nastia as we know her, whom I met during my time in Poland.', "It's my second trip to Ukraine since Russia's full -scale invasion last February and during that first trip last spring on my way to Ukraine I made stops in Hungary and Poland. I made dozens of refugees during that time and so many of their stories stuck with me. During my time in Poland I met a 15 -year -old Ukrainian refugee named Anastasia Spot or Nastia as we know her."]
